message:
refactor(robot): use global alert tracker from alerts package and add DashboardAlertsData type

Replace the package-local alertTrackerGlobal variable with
alerts.GetGlobalTracker() from the dedicated alerts package, removing
the tight coupling between the robot projection layer and the alert
tracker initialization path.

Export DashboardAlertsData as a named struct type for the alerts
section payload, making it available for downstream consumers that
need to deserialize the section data.

Remove the Source field from AlertInfo since it was dropped from the
upstream alert struct.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
